**Compliance Statement**
Generally, the building design and the design of the fire safety systems for ██████ are compliant with The Code, as defined in the Fire Safety Systems – Building Design Code published in August 2019. This will mean that, subject to the caveats hereby noted in this report and subject to the correct submission of GCNP Application Form and provision of the drawings set in the format required by GCNP, then the GCNP Fire Certificate will be issued.
